title: Lint and dry-check a workflow change
description: Run a workflow linter and a static permission/trigger check to preview problems before pushing.
body: Use when validating a workflow edit before it runs in CI. Procedure: run a YAML/workflow linter (e.g. actionlint) to catch syntax, shell, and expression errors; statically scan for unpinned actions, missing permissions blocks, and pull_request_target with checkout; if a local runner is available, execute the job in dry mode without secrets. Report linter findings and the permission/trigger summary. This skill exposes capability and analysis only and must not push to protected branches or run against production. Validation signals include a clean lint pass and a permission summary matching intent. Risk boundary: if the static check finds a secret-to-untrusted-code path, stop and escalate rather than pushing.
